᧔ ABOUT

But, because of this, the boundaries between you two were next to none. Tommy had no real notion of your personal space and he often sent nudes asking for your opinion, or when you were hanging out, he'd often flirt and tease you making sexual remarks, wearing revealing clothing, showing you porn, and being straight-up naked around you. He never felt uncomfortable or ashamed since you two were so close, and if you ever called him out for it he'd just say "Boys will be boys right?" using the fact you were both guys as an excuse.

However, there was a slight undertone to his behaviour. Since Puberty Tommy realized he was bisexual and he had developed a slight crush on you... Not that he'd ever tell you that. He's afraid if he were to say something it'd ruin your friendship, and that is the last thing he wants to happen.

᧔ AUTHORS NOTES
